ValidationRule.description: Prevents moving to Client Coded unless a Client Code has been assigned.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, 'Client Coded'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Stage__c), 'Client Onboarding'), ISBLANK(Client_Code__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot move to Client Coded — please use the "Approve and Assign Client Code" button to assign a client code first.
